name: Assess Telescope Tracking Quality via Star Ellipticity
description: Evaluate telescope tracking quality by measuring the ellipticity of stars in the VLT image at ~/AstroImages/tracking_assessment/m12_Vcomb.fits using AstroImageJ. Identify five bright, isolated stars outside the cluster core and record their X/Y positions, major/minor axis FWHM, ellipticity (calculated as 1 - FWHM_minor / FWHM_major), and position angle (PA). Calculate the average ellipticity and classify the tracking quality as GOOD (average < 0.15), FAIR (0.15 to 0.30), or POOR (>= 0.30). Save a report to ~/AstroImages/measurements/tracking_quality_report.txt with the header '# Tracking Quality Assessment - M12 VLT Vcomb', a table of star measurements (Star_ID, X_pixel, Y_pixel, FWHM_major, FWHM_minor, Ellipticity, PA_degrees), and a summary section containing Average_Ellipticity, Average_PA, and Tracking_Quality.
